name: oac
description: OpenAgentsControl — multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Context-aware development with skills, subagents, parallel execution, and automated code review.

skills.name: using-oac
skills.description: Establishes how to find and use OAC skills

skills.name: context-discovery
skills.description: Discover coding standards and project conventions before implementation

skills.name: external-research
skills.description: Fetch external library/framework documentation before writing code

skills.name: task-breakdown
skills.description: Break complex features into subtasks with dependency tracking

skills.name: code-execution
skills.description: Execute a coding subtask from a JSON task file

skills.name: test-generation
skills.description: Write comprehensive tests following project testing standards

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Review code for security, correctness, and quality

skills.name: oac-approach
skills.description: Plan before implementation — discover context and propose approach

commands.name: install-context
commands.description: Download context files from the OAC registry

commands.name: oac:status
commands.description: Show plugin status and installed context
